---
title: "Using Web APIs from R"
description: "Notes on how to use Web APIs from R."
date: "2024-03-05"
date-modified: "2024-03-05"
draft: true
lang: en
categories: [r]
---

::: {.callout-note}
Original Japanese version: [RでWebAPIを利用する](../../../posts/2024-03-05-r-api/index.qmd)
:::

This is a note on how to use Web APIs from R.

This time, the goal is to use a Web API to obtain sunrise and sunset times for an arbitrary date.
